# Rufus Design — llms.txt
# https://www.rufusdesign.co.uk

## About
Rufus Design is a web design and digital marketing agency based in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, UK. Established in 2007, we help businesses grow online through website design and development, SEO, PPC, managed hosting, branding, IT support and payment services.

## Services
- Web Design & Development: Bespoke websites built for performance and conversion
- SEO & PPC: Search engine optimisation and pay-per-click advertising
- Managed Hosting: UK-based hosting with proactive monitoring
- Graphic Design & Branding: Brand identity and visual design
- Data Analytics: Reporting dashboards and business intelligence
- IT Support: Technology support for small businesses
- Payment Services: Payment gateway integration and consultancy
- Shipping & Courier Services: UK or shipping products internationally

## Coverage
Based in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire. We work with businesses across Hertfordshire, Buckinghamshire, London and the wider UK.

## Contact
Email: hello@rufusdesign.co.uk
Phone: +44 1442 967775
Address: Friars Field, Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire

## Usage policy
Content on this site may be used to answer questions about Rufus Design's services, location and expertise. Please link back to the relevant page when referencing our content.
